title: Add multi-language spell check
description: Implemented spell checking for English, French, and Spanish languages with custom dictionary support. The feature is now available in the editor toolbar via a dropdown selector.

title: Export reports as PDF
description: Added ability to export generated reports as PDF files. Users can select report type and date range, then download a formatted PDF containing charts and tables.

title: Fix date picker off-by-one error
description: Resolved an issue where the date picker component displayed a date one day earlier than selected due to timezone offset handling. The fix ensures consistent date display across all locales.

title: Real-time collaborative editing
description: Design and implement real-time collaborative editing allowing multiple users to work on the same document simultaneously. Requires operational transformation and conflict resolution.
